item.title: Cornyn trails Paxton in Texas Senate GOP primary; Crockett leads Talarico in Democratic race
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn's reelection bid is looking shaky in Texas.

item.title: Puerto Rico stops for 13 minutes to applaud history and bask in Bad Bunny's glow
item.description: The Super Bowl lasted all of 13 minutes for many Puerto Ricans in San Juan and beyond.

item.title: DOJ reaches legal settlement declaring Biden's border 'parole' to be unlawful
item.description: The Trump administration has quietly struck a legal settlement that not only ends one of President Biden's mass migrant "parole" programs but could bl...

item.title: Nicaraguan government blocks key pathway used by Cuban migrants to reach United States
item.description: Nicaragua's government on Sunday blocked Cuban citizens from entering the country without a visa, effectively cutting off a key route for Cuban migrat...

item.title: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore says Democrats have 'oligation' to consider new congressional map
item.description: Gov. Wes Moore says the Maryland state Senate has an "obligation to vote" on legislation to redraw the state's congressional map -- a move Democrats h...
